tagline: Turn family chaos into plannable days.
no_upcoming_birthdays: No birthdays in the next 4 weeks
title: Title
name: Name
demo_banner: Demo mode: data is not saved
auth_footer: Your household data stays on your server.
privacy_note: Tribu is self-hosted. Household data stays on your server. Admin-only update checks may contact GitHub for release metadata.
data_management_desc: Import or export calendar and contacts.
phone_sync_empty: You are not a member of any family, so there is nothing to sync.
phone_sync_intro: Connect Tribu to iPhone and iPad Calendar and Contacts apps, and to Android through DAV-compatible clients such as DAVx5. Changes move in both directions.
phone_sync_auth_body: Apps log in with a Personal Access Token. Under API Tokens, create a token with scopes calendar:read, calendar:write, contacts:read and contacts:write, or use the * wildcard.
phone_sync_auth_hint: You only need the server URL below, your email as the username, and the token as the password.
phone_sync_available_body: After you sign in, Tribu automatically exposes the calendars and address books for every family you belong to. In DAVx5 or iOS, you can then enable the ones you want.
phone_sync_ios_step1: Settings > Calendar > Accounts > Add Account > Other > Add CalDAV Account.
phone_sync_ios_step2: Enter the server URL above. Your username is your email, and your password is the Personal Access Token.
phone_sync_ios_step3: For Contacts, add the same server again under Settings > Contacts > Accounts > Add Account > Other > Add CardDAV Account.
phone_sync_ios_step4: The available calendars and address books then show up in the Apple apps, and edits made on the iPhone sync back to Tribu.
phone_sync_android_body: Android has no native CalDAV/CardDAV support. Install DAVx5, an established open-source app that plugs into the system Calendar and Contacts providers.
phone_sync_android_step1: Open DAVx5, create a new account, and choose 'Login with URL and username'.
phone_sync_android_step2: Enter the server URL above. Your username is your email, and your password is the Personal Access Token.
phone_sync_android_step3: After sign-in, enable the calendars and address books you want; DAVx5 handles the bidirectional sync.
phone_sync_limit_incremental: Sync tokens are not honored yet; clients fall back to a full refresh on every conflict. Performance, not correctness.
phone_sync_limit_fields: Tribu only models name, email, phone, and birthday per contact. Any extra fields (ORG, ADR, notes, etc.) round-trip intact but do not appear in the Tribu UI.
phone_sync_coexist_heading: Using Tribu alongside Apple, Google, or Outlook
phone_sync_coexist_intro: Tribu is a separate calendar account, not a sync bridge. It runs side-by-side with your existing accounts so each event is owned by exactly one of them. Pick the one you want to edit from.
phone_sync_coexist_apple: iCloud: keep iCloud events on iCloud and Tribu events in the Tribu calendar. To bring an iCloud calendar in, export it as ICS from iCloud.com and use Calendar > Import. Imported events stay tagged as 'Imported' and re-importing the same file updates them in place.
phone_sync_coexist_google: Google Calendar: subscribe to the Tribu feed in Google with the calendar feed URL, or export Google calendars as ICS and import them into Tribu. The two will not bidirectionally sync; pick Tribu or Google as the source of truth per calendar.
phone_sync_coexist_outlook: Outlook / Exchange: add Tribu as an additional CalDAV account where supported, or import an Outlook ICS export. Outlook does not sync CalDAV from Microsoft 365 mailboxes. Use the export route there.
admin_demoted: Role changed to member (only adults can be admin)
admin_self_hint: You cannot change your own role
api_tokens_desc: Personal access tokens for third-party apps and scripts.
token_created_warning: Copy this token now. It will not be shown again.
token_revoke_confirm: Really revoke this token? Apps using it will lose access.
backup_retention_hint: Maximum number of backups to keep
backup_volume_hint: Backups are stored in the configured backup volume. Use external storage for safer retention.
push_blocked_hint: Push notifications are blocked by your browser. Allow them in your browser settings.
push_unavailable_title: Push is not available in this browser
push_unavailable_hint: On iPhone or iPad, install Tribu to the Home Screen and open the installed app. Android needs HTTPS and notification permission.
push_server_not_configured_hint: Ask an admin to add VAPID keys on the server and restart Tribu.
push_sender_unavailable: Push sending is not available on the server
push_sender_unavailable_hint: The server dependency for Web Push is missing. Notifications stay in-app until this is fixed.
push_device_not_subscribed: This device is not subscribed yet
push_device_not_subscribed_hint: Enable push on this device. Reminders will then arrive outside the open app.
push_ready_hint: Tribu can send reminders as push notifications to this installed app.
push_categories_help: Choose which family updates may leave the app as browser push. In-app notifications still stay available.
push_category_calendar_reminders_desc: Upcoming events based on your reminder time.
push_category_task_due_desc: Tasks that are due soon or overdue.
push_category_birthdays_desc: Birthday reminders for your family calendar.
push_category_event_assignments_desc: Events where someone assigns or mentions you.
push_category_shopping_changes_desc: Shopping list updates when you want extra visibility.
nav_order_desc: Customize the order of navigation items. The first 5 appear in the bottom bar on mobile.
add_member_desc: Create a new family member with a temporary password.
member_created_warning: Copy this temporary password now. It will not be shown again.
force_change_password_desc: Your account was created with a temporary password. Please set a new password to continue.
security_desc: Change the password used to sign in to your tribu account.
remove_member_confirm: Really remove this member from the family?
invite_link_hint: Copy this link and share it. Members can register themselves.
invite_intro: Invite the rest of your household. Each link lets one person create their own account and join your family.
invite_role_helper: Members can use everything the family shares. Admins can also invite people, manage members, and change settings, so keep admin links for trusted adults you live with.
invite_adult_helper: Adults can be made admins and see content marked for adults only. Children see a simplified view tuned for kids.
invite_link_share_hint: Send this link directly to the person you are inviting. Tell them it expires soon and that they will set their own password after opening it.
invite_page_invalid: This invitation link is invalid or has expired.
invite_page_role_admin: an admin (full access, can manage members and settings)
invite_page_role_adult_member: an adult member of the family
invite_page_role_child_member: a child member with a simplified view
invite_page_next_step_account: Create your account or sign in with your existing identity provider.
invite_page_next_step_join: You will be added to {family} automatically, no extra approval needed.
invite_page_next_step_start: Jump straight into the shared calendar, tasks, and shopping lists.
invite_page_privacy_note: Your password and personal data stay on this server.
sso.title: Single Sign-On
sso.desc: Delegate authentication to your own identity provider over OpenID Connect. Tested with Authentik, Zitadel, and Keycloak.
sso.preset_hint: The preset only fills placeholder text and the default login button label. Tribu talks to any OIDC provider via discovery.
sso.button_label_hint: Leave empty to use the preset default.
sso.client_secret_set: A secret is already stored. Leave empty to keep it.
sso.allow_signup_hint: Required for invitation links that finish via SSO. Without an invitation no account is created.
sso.disable_password_login_hint: Only takes effect once SSO is fully configured so you cannot lock yourself out.
sso.redirect_uri_hint: Register this redirect URL at your provider: {url}
sso.password_disabled_hint: Password login is disabled on this instance. Please use SSO.
sso.error.missing_state: Session expired. Please sign in again.
sso.error.invalid_state: Invalid session. Please sign in again.
sso.error.state_mismatch: Session mismatch. Please sign in again.
sso.error.config_changed: SSO configuration changed. Please sign in again.
sso.error.discovery_failed: The identity provider is not reachable.
sso.error.provider_error: The identity provider rejected the login.
sso.error.id_token_invalid: The provider's ID token is invalid.
sso.error.oidc_signup_disabled: No account exists for this email. Please use an invitation.
sso.error.oidc_id_token_invalid: The provider did not return a verified email.
base_url_hint: URL of your Tribu instance (for invite links). Leave empty for auto-detection.
setup_welcome_desc: Set up your family hub in just a few steps.
setup_restore_drop: Drag & drop your backup file here, or click to browse
setup_done_desc: Your family hub is ready. Let's get started.
subscriptions_desc: Subscribe to your calendar and contacts in external apps (Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, etc.).
sub_setup_android: Open Google Calendar → Settings → Add calendar → From URL → Paste the calendar feed URL.
sub_setup_ios: Open Settings → Calendar → Accounts → Add Account → Other → Add Subscribed Calendar → Paste the calendar feed URL.
sub_setup_contacts_hint: Open the contacts feed URL in your browser to download a VCF file that can be imported into any contacts app.
sub_token_missing: Create a subscription token first to generate feed URLs.
about_support_desc: Tribu is free and open source. If you enjoy it, consider supporting the project.
error.NOT_A_MEMBER: Not a member of this family
error.INVALID_ROLE: Role must be admin or member
error.CANNOT_RESET_OWN_PASSWORD: Cannot reset your own password here
error.COLOR_ALREADY_TAKEN: Color already taken by another member
error.ASSIGNEE_NOT_FAMILY_MEMBER: Assignee is not a family member
error.CSV_MISSING_COLUMN: CSV requires at least the column full_name
onboarding.welcome_subtitle: Here's what you can do together.
onboarding.tour_calendar_desc: See everyone's schedule at a glance.
onboarding.tour_notifications_desc: Stay in the loop with reminders for events and tasks.
onboarding.upload_photo: Tap to add a profile photo
landing.hero_subtitle: Bring the household into one calm place.
landing.feat_calendar_desc: Shared family calendar with events, reminders, and recurring appointments.
landing.feat_tasks_desc: To-do lists for the whole family. Assign, prioritize, and track together.
landing.feat_shopping_desc: Shared shopping lists that sync in real-time across all devices.
landing.feat_notifications_desc: Stay in the loop with reminders for events, birthdays, and tasks.
leave_family_desc: Leave this family. Your data in this family will be removed.
leave_family_confirm: Are you sure you want to leave this family? This cannot be undone.
leave_family_last_admin: You are the only admin. Transfer admin role to another member first.
delete_account_desc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data.
delete_account_confirm: Type DELETE to confirm permanent account deletion.
search.title: Search
display_intro: Pair shared screens (kitchen tablet, hallway frame) with a read-only family dashboard.
display_not_a_person: A display is a device, not a person. It has no email, no password, and does not appear in your member list.
display_name_helper: Used for your reference (e.g. 'Kitchen Tablet', 'Hallway Frame').
display_link_hint: Open this link on the device once to pair it. The link is shown only this one time.
display_link_share_hint: Anyone with this link can show your family dashboard until you revoke it.
display_revoke_confirm: Remove the display "{name}"? It will stop showing your dashboard immediately.
display_refresh_helper: Seconds. E-Ink mode is clamped to slower, panel-friendly refreshes.
display_create_section_hint: Choose a preset, check the preview, then pair the new screen.
display_compact_preview_hint: {preset} preview. Use Configure layout to adjust this device before saving.
phone_sync_health_body: These tokens can sync calendars or contacts. You can see when a client last connected successfully and whether a safe error category needs attention.
phone_sync_health_empty: No DAV-capable token yet. Create a token with calendar or contact permissions and set it up on the device.
phone_sync_failure_scope_mismatch: Permissions do not match the client
phone_sync_failure_not_found: Calendar or address book not found
phone_sync_disable_confirm: Disable this sync token? Connected devices will lose access.
phone_sync_health_error: The sync status could not be loaded or changed right now. Please try again.
backup_confidence_empty: No export has been created yet. Create one now so you know the backup path works.
backup_restore_setup_wizard: Restore during the setup wizard on a fresh installation. The archive is validated, restored, and migrated before first login.
backup_excluded_host_files_outside_datab: Host files outside the database and backup volume
notification_destinations_help: Send reminder summaries to Apprise channels such as Gotify, ntfy, Telegram, Matrix, or email. This is for people, not automation webhooks.
notification_destinations_privacy: Destination URLs may contain passwords or tokens. Messages leave Tribu and may show household data in the external app.
notification_destinations_provider_unava: Apprise is not available on this server
notification_destinations_examples: Examples: ntfy://ntfy.sh/family-topic, gotify://host.example/token, tgram://bot-token/chat-id. Use placeholders in docs and never paste shared secrets into screenshots.
notification_destinations_save_failed: Notification destination could not be saved
notification_destinations_secret_saved: Secret URL saved, never shown again
notifications_external_destinations_titl: Send reminders and shopping activity outside Tribu
notifications_external_destinations_help: Admins can add Gotify, ntfy, Telegram, Matrix, or email destinations for household reminders and selected shopping activity.
